description: You can use the elements in the compress folder to compress the data before sending the HTTP request and decompress it after receiving the HTTP response.

services.name: pub.compress:compressData
description: WmPublic. Compresses the data before sending the HTTP request using any of the specified compression schemes.

input_parameters.name: data
description: Important: When you use more than one key, string is appended first, bytes is appended second, and stream is appended last and Integration Server uses the first key that it encounters.

children.name: string
description: Optional. Text that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress.

children.name: bytes
description: Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress.

children.name: stream
description: Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress.

input_parameters.name: compressionScheme
description: The compression method you want the pub.compress:compressData service to apply to compress the data. The supported compression schemes are gzip and deflate.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
description: - bytes to store the data as a byte[ ].
- stream to store the data as a java.io.InputStream.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set that specifies the encoding to use when converting the String to an array of bytes (for example: ISO-8859-1).

output_parameters.name: compressedData
description: Compressed data after applying the compression scheme.

children.name: bytes
description: Conditional. Compressed data represented as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

children.name: stream
description: Conditional. Compressed data represented as an InputStream. stream is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.

services.name: pub.compress:decompressData
description: WmPublic. Decompresses the data based on the response header of the HTTP response.

input_parameters.name: data
description: Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress. Specify data using one of the following keys.

children.name: bytes
description: Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress.

children.name: stream
description: Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress.

input_parameters.name: compressionScheme
description: The compression scheme you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to apply to decompress the data. The supported compression schemes are gzip and deflate.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
description: - bytes to return the data as a byte[ ].
- stream to return the data as a java.io.InputStream.

output_parameters.name: decompressedData
description: Decompressed data after applying the compression algorithm.

children.name: bytes
description: Conditional. Decompressed data represented as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

children.name: stream
description: Conditional. The decompressed data represented as an InputStream. stream is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.
